description: Manage multiple influencers, track performance, automate commissions

items.name: Influencer selection
items.tactic: Engagement rate > followers (10k engaged > 100k ghost). Niche alignment > size. LTV tracked.

items.name: Promo code tracking
items.tactic: Each influencer: unique code (INFL_NAME). Link: aff.link?utm_source=infl_name. Sales 100% tracked.

items.name: Commission automation
items.tactic: Influencer sells 10 units = 10 * commission_rate auto-calc. Pay weekly.

items.name: Fraud detection
items.tactic: Sales spike = verify real. Detect fake affiliates selling to themselves.
